channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Ukraine will ask allies to boost its air defenses at a meeting in Germany, Zelenskyy says
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said he will again call on allies to boost his country's air defenses at a meeting this week in Germany, as U.S. President-elect Donald Trump takes over later this month with a vow to end the almost three-year war quickly.
item.dc:creator: VOLODYMYR YURCHUK and ELISE MORTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Austrian People’s Party nominates Christian Stocker as interim leader after Nehammer resigns
item.description: VIENNA (AP) — Austrian People’s Party on Sunday nominated its General Secretary Christian Stocker as interim leader after the expected resignation of Chancellor Karl Nehammer, Austrian news agency APA reported.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANIE LIECHTENSTEIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A major winter storm threatens parts of the central U.S. with snow, ice and even blizzards
item.description: A major, disruptive winter storm was sweeping across the central U.S. and headed toward the mid-Atlantic on Sunday, forecasters said, bringing with it a dreaded combination of snow, ice and plunging temperatures.
item.dc:creator: Heather Hollingsworth And Brian Witte, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A major winter storm threatens parts of the central U.S. with snow, ice and even blizzards
item.description: A major, disruptive winter storm was sweeping across the central U.S. on Sunday, forecasters said, bringing with it a dreaded combination of snow, ice and plunging temperatures.
item.dc:creator: HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH and BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: New Orleans mourns victims of truck attack with tearful vigil and celebration of life
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — New Orleans mourned, wept and danced at a vigil Saturday evening along the famous thoroughfare where a man rammed a pickup truck into a crowd, killing and injuring revelers who were there to celebrate the new year.
item.dc:creator: JIM MUSTIAN, JACK BROOK, STEPHEN SMITH and SARA CLINE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Golden Globes are Sunday night. Here are five things to look for and how to watch them
item.description: After a rocky few years and the disbanding of the Hollywood Foreign Press Association, the Golden Globes have seemingly stabilized. Now the question is: Can they still put on a good show? The 82nd Golden Globes, beginning Sunday night at 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JAKE COYLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals keep their playoff hopes alive by edging the Steelers 19-17
item.description: Joe Burrow passed for 277 yards and a touchdown, Cade York kicked four field goals and the Cincinnati Bengals kept their slim playoff hopes alive with a 19-17 win over the floundering Pittsburgh Steelers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Drawn to New Orleans' iconic street of celebration, a night of partying becomes a nightmare
item.description: The night, like countless others Bourbon Street has welcomed over the decades, started out ripe for celebration.
item.dc:creator: ADAM GELLER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Soldier who exploded Cybertruck in Las Vegas did not show any 'concerning behavior' before leave request: Army
item.description: The driver who exploded a Cybertruck in front of the Trump hotel in Las Vegas didn't show concerning behaviors at the time he was granted personal leave from his station, the Army said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drivers skid and crash as wintry mix grips central US before moving east
item.description: MISSION, Kan. (AP) — Road conditions were deteriorating Saturday in the central U.S. as a winter storm brought a mix of snow, ice and plunging temperatures, with forecasts calling for the dreaded combo to spread eastward in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH and BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Carter's state funeral has started. Here's what to know
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Six days of funeral observances for former President Jimmy Carter began Saturday in Georgia, where he died on Dec. 29 at the age of 100.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Washington Post cartoonist quits after paper rejects sketch of Bezos bowing to Trump
item.description: A cartoonist has decided to quit her job at the Washington Post after an editor rejected her sketch of the newspaper's owner and other media executives bowing before President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: TODD RICHMOND, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What to know as snow, freezing rain and bitter cold heads through much of the US
item.description: A major winter storm began Saturday in the central U.S. and was forecast to move east over the next several days, producing heavy snow, significant ice and frigid temperatures, according to the National Weather Service.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Indie filmmaker Jeff Baena, Aubrey Plaza's husband, found dead at Los Angeles home
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Writer-director Jeff Baena, whose darkly comedic independent films included “The Little Hours” and who was married to his frequent creative collaborator Aubrey Plaza, has died. He was 47.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: More than 500 animals killed during fire at Texas shopping center
item.description: More than 500 animals at a Dallas shopping center pet shop were killed when a fire broke out at the structure, fire authorities said this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Veteran and 'devoted father,' 68, stabbed to death on New Year’s Eve: police
item.description: A 68-year-old military veteran in Alabama was allegedly stabbed to death by his girlfriend in a New Year's Eve attack, and family members remembered their devoted father.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 39,000 John Deere mowers recalled
item.description: About 39,000 John Deere ZTrak™ Zero Turn Mowers with Kawasaki Engines have been recalled because the voltage regulator inside the mower's engine can fail while in use or while the product is being stored.
item.dc:creator: Mac Bell, Fox 5

item.title: Florida mom makes teen son turn himself in for crime
item.description: A 15-year-old boy accused of armed attempted robbery was brought to Florida deputies to be turned in, by his own mother.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KRON4

item.title: Paleontologists learn from rare 'Teen Rex' specimen
item.description: Details about the juvenile Tyrannosaurus rex fossil discovered by three boys in North Dakota are beginning to take shape, including its size, age and how its body worked.
item.dc:creator: Heather Willard, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New Orleans mourns victims of truck attack with tearful vigil and celebration of life
item.description: New Orleans has held a vigil on Bourbon Street to mourn and celebrate the lives of those killed when a man rammed a pickup truck into a crowd, killing and injuring revelers celebrating the new year.
item.dc:creator: Jim Mustian, Jack Brook, Stephen Smith And Sara Cline, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Judge sets Trump's sentencing in hush money case for Jan. 10, but signals no jail time
item.description: In an extraordinary turn, a judge Friday set President-elect Donald Trump's sentencing in his hush money case for Jan. 10 — little over a week before he's due to return to the White House — but promised not to jail him.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and JENNIFER PELTZ Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Video shows U.S. Border Patrol agent appear to knee K-9
item.description: FALFURRIAS, Texas (ValleyCentral) — The U.S. Border Patrol Union of the Rio Grande Valley has issued a statement on an incident of what appears to be an agent kneeing a Border Patrol K-9.
item.dc:creator: Veronica Salinas, KTLA 5

item.title: Federal courts won't refer Clarence Thomas to attorney general over ethics
item.description: Thomas has agreed to follow updated requirements on reporting trips and gifts, including clearer guidelines on hospitality from friends.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Republican Mike Johnson reelected as House speaker after dramatic floor vote
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican Mike Johnson won reelection to the House speakership on a first ballot Friday, pushing past GOP hard-right holdouts and buoyed with a nod of support from President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, FARNOUSH AMIRI and KEVIN FREKING Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Federal appeals court strikes down Biden net neutrality rules
item.description: The ruling hands a blow to FCC Democrats and Biden admin officials who pushed for revived open internet measures.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Federal appeals court strikes down Biden net neutrality rules
item.description: A federal appeals court ruled this week the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) lacked the authority to restore certain net neutrality rules last year, handing a blow to FCC Democrats and Biden administration officials who pushed for revived open internet measures.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, ABC 4

item.title: John Capodice, actor who appeared in 'Ace Ventura,' 'Seinfeld' and more, dies at 83
item.description: News of Capodice’s death on Monday was publicly announced in an obituary posted by the Pizzi Funeral Home in Northvale, New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Biden awards the 2nd highest civilian award to leaders of the Jan. 6 committee and 18 others
item.description: President Joe Biden on Thursday awarded the second highest civilian medal to Liz Cheney and Bennie Thompson, leaders of the congressional investigation into the Capitol riot who Donald Trump has said should be jailed for their roles in the inquiry.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A spectacular meteor shower is about to peak. How and when to watch
item.description: (KTLA) - Stargazers are in for a treat as the Quadrantids Meteor Shower, one of the year's best, reaches its peak over the Northern Hemisphere, according to NASA. This annual meteor shower is unique because it originates from an asteroid, 2003 EH1, rather than a comet.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 people.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NYE drone show canceled on Folly Beach after drones fall from sky; at least 1 injured
item.description: FOLLY BEACH, S.C. (WCBD) - A new drone show on Folly Beach was canceled Tuesday night after the drones malfunctioned and fell from the sky. Organizers completed two drone displays before they all went down, News 2 learned.
item.dc:creator: Tim Renaud, WGN 9

item.title: British man and a nursing assistant were the last victims identified in New Orleans attack
item.description: A British man who was killed when the driver of a white pickup truck sped down Bourbon Street packed with holiday revelers was identified Saturday as the stepson of a former nanny to the Royal Family.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Have any New Year's resolutions? Here are some tips to help make them stick
item.description: Studies have shown that up to 70% of people who make New Year’s resolutions abandon those good intentions within months. Here are some tips for how to keep those resolutions when your willpower starts to falter.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Why you should probably throw away your Christmas tree this week
item.description: With the holiday season now behind us, it might be time to consider losing your Christmas trees, too.
item.dc:creator: Tylor Sorensen, ABC 4
